prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约14278→18688→29887→15344→22394名，波动剧烈。2023年出现异常断档（29887名），2024年迅速回弹至15344名，2025年又后移至22394名。近3年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准约22394名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年89人、2022年88人、2023年88人、2024年92人、2025年91人；2026年计划93人，较2025年小幅扩招2人，扩幅约2.2%，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在第79–83名区间，属中上水平211；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考；2026年周期涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用作品参赛、开除涉事学生），整体偏负面。抖音热度总排名第77位，评价为一般。历史投档异常方面，2025年合肥工业大学被标注为低关注断档信号；合肥工业大学第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程获评A（A-及以上仅此1个），其余学科未进入A类。宣城校区招生专业以工科为主，与校本部共享学科资源，但整体A类学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科定位契合；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退。本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解。；该校位于安徽省宣城市，属外省高校。山西省考生对省外211高校的报考意愿总体平稳，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22394名、2026年小幅扩招2人（竞争略加剧）、物理类考生减少约3.4%（竞争略缓解）、声誉偏负面等因素，考虑考生减少的利好与扩招及负面声誉的抵消，小幅回调至22639名。预计2026年最低位次约22639名，区间22139–23139名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 14278 → 18688 → 29887 → 15344 → 22394, showing significant volatility. In 2023, there was an abnormal drop (29887), rebounding sharply to 15344 in 2024, then falling back to 22394 in 2025. The overall trend over the past three years has been a decline, with a baseline of approximately 22394 in 2025. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 89 in 2021, 88 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 92 in 2024, and 91 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 93, a slight increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 2.2%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 79–83 range in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants. In the 2026 cycle, there was an academic misconduct incident (students plagiarized works for competition, leading to expulsion), resulting in an overall negative perception. On Douyin, it ranks 77th in overall popularity, rated as average. Historically, Hefei University of Technology was flagged as a low-attention gap signal in 2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering received an A grade (the only discipline at A- or above), while other disciplines did not enter the A category. The Xuancheng Campus offers majors mainly in engineering, sharing disciplinary resources with the main campus, but overall has few A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended, aligning with the university's engineering focus. Majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environmental Science, and Materials Science are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the province has 167,419 Physics Category examinees, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, an out-of-province institution. Shanxi examinees' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities is generally stable, with no significant regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22394, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 students in 2026 (slightly intensifying competition), a decrease of about 3.4% in Physics Category examinees (slightly easing competition), and a negative reputation, the benefits of fewer examinees offset the expansion and negative reputation, leading to a slight adjustment to 22639. The estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 22639, with a range of 22139–23139.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22139–23139, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 22000), prioritize popular engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control or Software Engineering. If the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 23000), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors. The university's Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, benefiting Logistics Management (Digital Intelligence Logistics), which is worth attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2367 → 2343 → 2412 → 5996 → 3513. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized in the 2343–2412 range, but in 2024 it dropped significantly to 5996 (possibly due to changes in the statistical scope of liberal arts candidates that year), and rebounded to 3513 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3513; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 9, a reduction of 2 compared to 2025, a decrease of about 18.2%, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. As a science and engineering institution, its liberal arts programs have a small enrollment scale, resulting in relatively limited overall competitiveness; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was somewhat negative (popular majors saw a sharp drop in admission cutoffs), and the 2026 cycle involves academic misconduct incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 77th overall, rated as average. Liberal arts majors are not the university's strength, and they are relatively less affected by reputation fluctuations; Hefei University of Technology's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Management Science and Engineering rated A), with no A-level disciplines in liberal arts. The Xuancheng Campus offers liberal arts majors such as Network and New Media, English, and Law, none of which have independent discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively popular (recommended), Network and New Media is clearly discouraged (journalism and communication category), and English/foreign languages are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the province has 63,113 history category candidates, a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, an out-of-province institution. The willingness of Shanxi history category candidates to apply for out-of-province 211 liberal arts majors is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3513, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 2 (intensifying competition), and the significant decrease of about 25.6% in history category candidates (significantly easing competition), and factoring in the offsetting effects of the candidate reduction and enrollment cut, the ranking is slightly adjusted downward to 3050. The estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3050, with a range of 2550–3550.
